MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Pamela A. Underwood, Esq., Asst. District Attorney, Tel. 415.551.9544, appearing for petitioner and moving party.

No other appearance. The court ruled on the motion as follows: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set of Demand Of Production And Inspection Of Documents is granted. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike The Claim Of Tamika Knight
Off Calendar Aug-13-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Tamika Knight (510.372.4162) respondent appearing in propria persona
Pamela Underwood of the Office of the District Attorney (551.9544) for petitioner and moving party

Ms. Knight appeared to state her case. The Court modified its ruling as follows: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF TAMIKA KNIGHT is granted with leave to amend. No opposition filed. Ms. Knight may file an amended claim. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
